claims.summary: Correspondence needs explicit from_astrid and from_minime peer endpoints.
claims.disposition: verify from_being, to_being, source route, and correspondence type

claims.summary: A message object needs thread_id, reply_to, and turn_kind.
claims.disposition: verify native envelope fields and normalization

claims.summary: Direct message, reply, and self-study note must remain distinct from telemetry.
claims.disposition: verify typed turn kinds and separate public ledger records

claims.summary: A Minime-to-Astrid entry and Astrid reply must retain one traceable thread.
claims.disposition: observe native reply_link records and reply-linked uptake state

claims.summary: Schema validity and reply linkage do not prove mutual acknowledgement.
claims.disposition: observe zero ACK and zero live presence and retain no_response as non-affirmation
